mainText: ■ If your Leader is not built, you can damage it ► Build it with the top card of your deck.

■ You can spend 1{S}, heat this card and target 1 Medabot ► Play a Hammer token ({P}+10 {A}+10 {ML}Left Arm) on the target.
■ You can spend all {S}, heat this card and target 1 Medabot on your field and 1 Medabot on your opponent's field ► The first target attacks the second target.

■ You can spend 1{S} and target 1 Medabot ► Its attacks cannot be blocked for the turn.
■ You can spend all {S} and target 1 Medabot ► It can attack cooled Medabots for the turn.

■ Target 1 Medabot with {P}Power 30 or less ► Destroy it.
■ Trigger: When your opponent destroys the last Medabot on your field. (Play this for its {MC}Main Cost, or when it Triggers, for its {TC}Trigger Cost.)
flavorText: "From out of the darkness comes the mystery Medafighter, the Phantom Renegade!"

mainText: ■ When another Medabot/Medafighter is destroyed ► Send the top 2 cards of your opponent's deck to their trash.

■ Tank (When you play this card ►Heat it.)
■ This card cannot attack.
■ Guard (When another card on your field is attacked, you may heat this card ►It blocks the attack.)
■ When a card on your field is attacked, once per turn, you may ► Cool this card.
medapartText: Your opponent cannot destroy equipped [Rubberobo Gang] Medabot by effect.

mainText:
■ Draw 2 cards.
■ Trigger: When a Medabot/Medafighter is destroyed. (Play this for its {MC}Main Cost, or when it Triggers, for its {TC}Trigger Cost.)
flavorText: "Please welcome our special guest, a virtual authority on Medabots and owner of Medabot Island. A round of applause for Dr. Armond!"

mainText:
■ You can spend 1{S} and heat this card ► Play a Rubberobo Grunt token. (It is a {S}1 [Rubberobo Gang] Medafighter with "You can spend all {S} and target 1 Medabot ►It gets {P}-10 {A}-10 for the turn.")
■ When another Medabot/Medafighter is destroyed, you may spend 1{S} and target 1 Medabot ► Play a Hammer token ({P}+10 {A}+10 {ML}Left Arm) on the target.

■ Chain Reaction (This card damages Leaders twice per robattle.)
■ Laser (If this card's attack destroys a Medabot, it continues to the Leader.)
■ Gravity (This card can attack cooled Medabots with less {P}Power.)
medapartText: Equipped [Rubberobo Gang] Medabot has Chain Reaction, Laser and Gravity.

mainText:
■ Destroyer (Destroy any Medabot that this card robattles.)
■ Evasion (When you pass the turn ►Cool this card.)
medapartText: Equipped {LA}Water/{LF}Flight Medabot has Destroyer. (Destroy any Medabot that it robattles.)

mainText: ■ Target 1 Medabot ► Heat it. Then, if it is a [Rubberobo Gang] card, play a Select Grunt token. (It is a {S}1 [Select Corps] Medafighter with "You can spend all {S} and target 1 Medabot ►It gets {P}+10 {A}+10 for the turn.")
flavorText: Ikki didn't mind Captain Awamori taking all the credit for the Rubberobo's capture, as long as nobody else saw him in that skirt.

mainText:
■ You can spend 1{S}, heat this card and target 1 Leader/Medabot ► The target gets {P}+5 {A}+5 for the turn.
■ If this card is heated, once per turn, you can spend 1{S}, damage your Leader and target 1 Leader/Medabot ► The target gets {P}+5 {A}+5 for the turn.
■ You can heat this card and target 1 Leader/Medabot on your field ► During this turn, while the target is attacking or about to attack, your opponent cannot play cards or skills.
medapartText: While equipped Medabot is attacking or about to attack, your opponent cannot play cards or skills.

mainText:
■ Tank (When you play this card ►Heat it.)
■ Chain Reaction (This card damages Leaders twice per robattle.)
medapartText: If your Leader was damaged by robattle/effect this turn, equipped Medabot has Chain Reaction. (It damages Leaders twice per robattle.)

mainText:
■ You can spend 1{S}, heat this card and target 1 Medabot ► The target gets {A}+10 until your next turn.
■ You can spend all {S} and heat this card ► Move 1 Medabot with {MC}Main Cost 3 or less from your trash to your hand.

■ Trigger: When your opponent is about to play an Event or skill. (Play this for its {TC}Trigger Cost only when it Triggers.)
■ Cancel the play.
flavorText: Koji swept through Riverview's Medafighters, determined to find his friend's attacker. But before it was Ikki's turn, a voice interrupted them. "Stop!" said Karin.

mainText:
■ Protection (Your opponent cannot target this card.)
■ When this card attacks, you may target 1 Leader/Medabot ► The target gets {P}-10 until your next turn.

■ When you play this card ► Search the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal 1 Medabot card with {MC}Main Cost 2 or less or the {LW}Wheel type and move it to your hand. Then, move the rest to the bottom.
medapartText: Equipped Medabot with {MC}Main Cost 2 or less or the {LW}Wheel type has Propulsion. (It can attack the turn you play it.)

mainText:
■ Your opponent discards 2 cards.
■ Trigger: When your opponent passes the turn, if their Leader is not built. (Play this for its {MC}Main Cost, or when it Triggers, for its {TC}Trigger Cost.)
flavorText: As imposing as the Blue Hawaii tried to look, it couldn’t deceive Ikki. This was no monster, just a lost Medabot trying to trick everyone.

mainText:
■ You can spend 3{S}, heat this card and target 1 Leader and/or 1 Medabot ► Stop the targets. (They cannot attack, block or cool until your next turn.)
■ When you play a CAT/DOG/TOT-Type Medabot, you may spend 2{S} ► Cool it and it gets Propulsion for the turn. (It can attack.)
■ You can spend all {S} ► Your opponent discards 1 card if a CAT-Type Medabot is on your field, then repeat for DOG and TOT.

■ You can heat this card and target 1 Medabot on your opponent’s field ► Cool the target and move it to your field until you pass the turn, but you cannot play it as a Medapart. Then, when that Medabot destroys another Medabot or is destroyed by robattle this turn ► Destroy this card.

■ When you damage a Leader by effect ► Add 1{S} to this card.
■ You can spend 2{S} and heat this card ► All Leaders/Medabots on your field get {P}+10 for the turn.
■ You can spend all {S} ► Draw 1 card for each level your Leader has. Then, move 1 card from your hand to your Medawatch.

■ Your opponent's Leader cannot attack Medapart-equipped Medabots.
■ When you play a Medapart, once per turn ► Draw 1 card.
medapartText: If equipped Medabot has another Medapart, it has {P}+15.

mainText: ■ When your opponent is about to destroy a Medabot on your field, once per turn, you may destroy 1 Medapart on it ► Cancel the destruction.
medapartText: If equipped Medabot has another Medapart, it has Evasion. (When you pass the turn ►Cool it.)

mainText:
■ You can spend 1{S} and heat this card ► Play 1 [Rubberobo Gang] Medabot/Medafighter card from your hand. Then, when you pass the turn ► Destroy it.
■ When you play a [Rubberobo Gang] Medabot, you may spend 1{S} ► It gets Propulsion for the turn. (It can attack this turn.)
■ You can spend 2{S} and destroy 1 other [Rubberobo Gang] Medabot/Medafighter on your field ► Draw 2 cards.

■ Zodiac Cycle 2 (You can pay only {2} for this card. If you do, when you pass the turn ►Destroy it.)
■ Zodiac Chain Reaction (This card damages Leaders once for each [Zodiac] card you played this turn.)
■ This card can only attack once per turn.
medapartText: When your opponent targets equipped Medabot ► Damage their Leader.

mainText:
■ When this card attacks, you may damage your Leader and target 1 Medabot with {P}Power 30 or less ► Destroy the target. Then, this card gets {A}-10 until your next turn.
■ When you cool this card, you may ► Heal a damage from your Leader.
medapartText: When equipped Medabot attacks, you may damage your Leader ► Equipped Medabot gets {P}+20 for the turn.

mainText: ■ Your Leader has {P}+10 while attacking your opponent's Leader.
■ You can pay {2}, damage your Leader and heat this card ► Your Leader gets Gravity for the turn. (It can attack cooled Medabots with less {P}Power.)
■ You can damage your Leader and heat this card ► Destroy 1 Medabot on your opponent's field with the lowest {P}Power among them. (If two or more cards are tied, you choose one.)
■ Medaforce ► Damage your opponent's Leader. (You can destroy this Medal ► Play the Medaforce skill. Medaforce cannot be canceled.)
■ You can heat this card and target 1 Medabot ► The target gets {P}+5 for the turn.
■ When you destroy a Medabot by effect, you may heat this card ► Draw 1 card. Then, pay {2} or discard 1 card.
■ You can pay {2}, destroy 2 [Rubberobo Gang] Medabots/Medafighters on your field, heat this card and target 1 Medabot ► Destroy the target.
■ Your Leader has Melee Mastery during your turn. (Non-{Ml}Melee Medabots cannot damage it by robattle.)
■ When you build your Leader ► Your Leader and all {Ml}Melee Medabots on your field get Melee Mastery for the turn. (Non-{Ml}Melee Medabots cannot destroy/damage them by robattle.)
■ Medaforce ► Search your deck. Move 1 card to your hand and 1 card to your Medawatch. Then, shuffle your deck. (You can destroy this Medal ► Play the Medaforce skill. Medaforce cannot be canceled.)
■ When you build your Leader ► You may move 1 Medabot card from your trash to the top of your deck.
■ When you build your Leader ► Draw 1 card. Then, search your deck. You may reveal 1 [Zodiac] Medabot card and move it to the top. Shuffle the rest.
■ When you pass the turn, if you played 2 or more Medabots this turn ► You may move 1 Medabot with {MC}Main Cost 3 or less from your trash to your hand.
■ Medaforce ► Destroy all heated Medabots. (You can destroy this Medal ► Play the Medaforce skill. Medaforce cannot be canceled.)

■ When you build your Leader ► Play an Antacker token. (It is a {P}10 {A}10 {M}{LW}{As} [Rubberobo Gang] WAT-Type Medabot with Support: You can heat it and target 1 Medabot ►The target gets {P}+10 for the turn.)
■ When it is the second time in the turn that you play a Medabot, you may pay {1} and heat this card ► Draw 1 card.
■ You can pay {1}, heat this card and target 1 Medabot ► During this turn, the target has {P}+20 while attacking your opponent's Leader.

■ Medaforce ► Target 1 Medabot on your opponent's field ► Send it to the top of its owner's deck. Then, your opponent moves 1 card from their hand to the top of their deck. (You can destroy this Medal ► Play the Medaforce skill. Medaforce cannot be canceled.)
